counters.description: fizz is a very hard matchup. he deals way more damage than katarina does, and his laningphase is more consistent. he has a big escape as well so its also hard for junglers to help you out. do not push lane early levels! best option is to not trade him before lv3 and the optimal buildpath is elecrto+boneplating+doublemr or conqueror+boneplating+overgrowth , starting dsword and trying to get advantage level 3
in 11.8 rumble mid is a tiny bit overbuffed not gonna lie eheh.
sylas is a popular pick midlane in 11.10. the weakest side of sylas is that he is pretty squishy early levels and in order to take the best advantage in lane you have to play aggro from lv2 to lv5.

kassadins started to adapt to katarina lately, most of them play with electro+boneplating+armor in stats and ignite, this allows them to have a incredible kill pressure in lane at level 3, and they can fight you and trade very easily.
akali has a lot of lane-poke and can easily outlane katarina, she can also 100 to 0 katarina when she hits level 6.
lee sin is becoming popular in the midlane. its a pretty hard matchup due to his insane sustain in lane and his high damage spike on his first back.
lately talon has been more dominant in the midlane. its a pretty hard matchup since talon has a way more burst than you and way more map mobility even from the first few levels.
unbarable laningphase, all you have to do is not fight her unless he has e on or q on cooldown.

diana is a pretty hard matchup, this one can be played with both conqueror and electrocute buildpaths, i usually play with conqueror+boneplating+mr in stats , starting with longsword+3pots and rushing botrk, once you have botrk closed you can face a pretty consistent 1v1 into diana.
galio is a very common matchup for katarina, the best option is going conqueror+both resolve/domination.
zed is one of the most common assasins you will find in soloqueue.
the best option in this scenario is running tp+ignite and find windows to roam/tp on sides.
annie is a lane bully for katarina, she has an insane range and high damage even early levels(most of them run electro and they just auto-q-auto)
very hard matchup, recommend conq/elec+secondwind+dshield start+tp ignite and putting your focus on sidelanes and wave management
just dodge, but for the braves i can help you out on that.
viktor is a pretty common matchup.

synergies.description: any frontline engage champ is the best synergy for katarina, all you need is setups in fights! also braum's passive works very nicely with katarina. katarina after season 11 updates is incentred on on-hit damage. every on-hit can proc braum's passive. ideally braum is the best ally to play around with katarina, if you ult on an enemy with braum's passive mark applied you will instantly stun him! same goes for shunpo, wich also deals on-hit damage!
aoe crowd control+damage, what else do you need for teamfights as katarina? :d
